title: lophochloa cavanillesii
intro: Lophochloa cavanillesii, also known as Cavanilles' grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid compounds. The health benefits of Lophochloa cavanillesii include the relief of digestive issues, reduction of fever, and treatment of skin infections. Lophochloa cavanillesii is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use.
